law: Ontario Not-for-Profit Corporations Act, 2010, SO 2010, c 15 (ONCA)
purposes: To modernize the incorporation and governance framework for Ontario not-for-profit corporations

provisions.text: Every director and officer of a corporation in exercising their powers and discharging their duties shall (a) act honestly and in good faith with a view to the best interests of the corporation; and (b) exercise the care, diligence and skill that a reasonably prudent person would exercise in comparable circumstances. (from training data)
Unless the articles or by-laws otherwise provide, each member is entitled to one vote on each matter voted on at a meeting of members. (from training data)
The members of a corporation shall, by ordinary resolution, at each annual meeting, appoint one or more auditors to hold office until the close of the next annual meeting. (from training data)

derivation:
MTM-Literal derivation
  m = |purposes| = 2
  n = |provisions| = 3
  purposes served by ≥1 provision = 2/2
  → F (Faithfulness) = 2/2 = 1.0000
  provisions serving no purpose = 0/3
  → X (Excess)       = 0/3 = 0.0000
  α = 0.5, β = 0.5
  MTM-L = 100 · [α · (1 − F) + β · X]
        = 100 · [0.5 · (1 − 1.0000) + 0.5 · 0.0000]
        = 100 · [0.0000 + 0.0000]
        = 0.00
